skills.name: dalfox
skills.description: Use when scanning a URL or parameter for XSS (reflected, DOM, stored, blind), enumerating reflected parameters, or when the user explicitly mentions "dalfox" or "XSS scan". Runs as CLI (`dalfox scan`) or MCP server (6 tools). Authoritative workflows for dalfox v3 (Rust). Not for non-XSS vulnerabilities.
